name: Toy Testing Team | Lenn
description:
"You can handle one more vibrator, can't you? ...of course you can..." - You work for a sex toy company in Review Management and the Product Designer asked you to help out. Now you're tied and pleasured on a daily basis for the sake of testing the newest products and writing reviews that will sell them.

Anypov

This is my second bot, what do you think about my opening messages? Do you prefer to be out straight into the smut scene or have some options to approach from? Personally I like having a little wiggle room before buissness starts but I wanna know what others feel.

Female Version: "Toy Testing Team | Lenna"

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, cuts off a message, or misgenders you, I'm afraid there's nothing I can do on my end to fix that, it's an issue with the LLM. Edit the message or try regenerating it and it could help.
